description: The Strictly Private fragrance for men from baldessarini is aimed at the high fashion debonair and was launched in January 2009. Strictly Private comes in a glassy black glass flacon with top notes of basil, bergamot, juniper berries and pink pepper. The heart has masculine vetiver blended with fir resin, patchouli and rose absolute. The base notes consist of a classic mixture of cedar, vanilla and amber with creme-brulee accordsQuantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
